prompt: #13 app store preparation — icons, splash, metadata, screenshots
summary: Added iOS Privacy Manifest, store.config.json with EAS Metadata for both stores (FINANCE category, 4+, description, keywords), eas.json submit config, privacy policy, and screenshot capture guide

prompt: Fix split/treat icons (#218)
summary: Added CallSplitIcon + CardGiftcardIcon to Split Bill / My Treat ToggleButtons in Add and Edit expense modals. PR #220.

prompt: idle QA — write missing tests for services/notifications.ts
summary: Added 17 unit tests covering all public notification functions: permission flow, daily reminder schedule/cancel/persist, budget alert threshold/deduplication/content

prompt: idle QA — budget mutation hooks + budget service tests
summary: Added 3 tests for useMutateBudget hooks and 3 tests for budget service API calls (POST/PUT/DELETE)

prompt: fix spurious test failures from stale worktree files
summary: Added /.claude/ to testPathIgnorePatterns in jest.config.js — fixes 11 failing tests caused by background agent worktree leftovers

prompt: #34 swipe-to-delete on transaction list rows
summary: Added SwipeableTransactionRow using Animated+PanResponder, left swipe reveals red Delete with Alert confirmation, uses existing useDeleteTransaction optimistic updates

prompt: #33 spending insights + #34 swipe-to-delete + #32 enhanced search hook
summary: Merged SpendingInsights dashboard section (top category, biggest expense, MoM), SwipeableTransactionRow (Animated+PanResponder), and useTransactionSearch hook with 300ms debounce and amount matching

prompt: feat(#31): add recurring transaction support
summary: Added recurring transactions: MMKV-backed recurrence rules (daily/weekly/monthly/yearly), auto-scheduling on app open, frequency picker in add/edit form, repeat icon on TransactionRow

prompt: QA: add unit tests for analytics service and useTransactionSearch hook
summary: 23 new tests covering analytics helpers (normaliseSummary, getPreviousMonthParams, fetchTransactionSummary) and useTransactionSearch filtering logic

prompt: fix: add Retry button to transactions error state + accessibility labels
summary: Added Retry button on transactions error state (PR #44) and accessibilityRole/accessibilityLabel to SettingRow, CurrencyModal, CategoriesModal, and add screen type toggle (PR #45)

prompt: feat(#46): 6-month spending trend bar chart on dashboard
summary: Added SpendingTrendChart (pure RN bars, no library), useTrendData hook (useQueries 6 months parallel), 7 tests; also merged dedup refactor (#47) and two UX fixes (#44 retry button, #45 accessibility labels)

prompt: feat: income/expense type filter chips on transactions screen
summary: Added All/Income/Expense chip filters to transactions screen, client-side filtering stacked on top of text search, resets on month change

prompt: fix: totals bar on transactions + currency bug in dashboard
summary: Added filter totals bar on transactions screen (PR #50); fixed USD hardcoding in 5 dashboard components — now reads currency from useSettings (PR #51)

prompt: test: dashboard component unit tests (#52)
summary: 32 tests across 5 dashboard components: SummaryCards, MoMComparison, BudgetProgress, CategoryBreakdown, SpendingTrendChart

prompt: fix: replace all as never type casts with proper types (#53)
summary: Removed as never from 3 router.push calls and 4 MaterialIcons name props; replaced with Href string and keyof typeof MaterialIcons.glyphMap

prompt: feat: budget month/year empty state (#58) + SettingRowProps icon type fix (#56)
summary: Budget empty state now shows month/year; SettingRowProps.icon typed as keyof MaterialIcons.glyphMap

prompt: feat: success toast after saving/updating transaction (#57)
summary: Added global Zustand toast store + animated Toast component in root layout; add.tsx fires toast before router.back() on mutation success

prompt: feat: toast on budget save/update
summary: Wired toast store to budgets.tsx onSuccess callbacks — Budget saved/updated messages consistent with transaction flow

prompt: test: coverage for format, useDashboard, useTransactions
summary: 35 new tests: formatCurrency edge cases, useSummary/useBudgets query keys and staleTime, useTransactions pagination logic

prompt: test: transaction service and api-client interceptor coverage
summary: 20 new tests covering all 5 transaction CRUD operations and both axios interceptors (token injection, 401 handling)
